description: Discover the joy of giving with our uniquely designed mystery boxes, perfect for enhancing consumer experience and boosting your retail promotions. This interactive concept is an excellent strategy for social media engagement, allowing you to spread positivity while promoting your brand. Each box is filled with surprises that embody the spirit of random acts of kindness. Ideal for non-profit initiatives, these mystery boxes are sure to create a buzz and make your giveaway stand out. Experience the power of generosity and inspire your audience to participate in this exciting journey. Make every unboxing moment memorable and impactful with our mystery boxes, where every item tells a story of kindness.
short_description: Boost your retail promotions with our mystery boxes designed to enhance consumer experience and promote random acts of kindness. Ideal for non-profit initiatives and social media engagement, these boxes make every unboxing moment impactful. Participate in this exciting journey of generosity today.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
2022 RANDOM ACTS OF KINDNESS DAY

MYSTERY GIVEAWAY

 
 

2021 showed us just how important (and easy) it is to give back and be kind. Random Acts of Kindness Day was created to inspire people to give back and make kindness a norm in society. We want to be a part of the solution so this year we are encouraging others to participate in RAK Day and will be giving away 5 mystery boxes to those who participate. Details below!

 
LEARN MORE
 

We will be giving away five mystery boxes on Random Acts of Kindness Day, here's a sneak peak of what you could win!

$50 Gift Card

32 oz Yeti

$500 Cash

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

 

Follow these steps to enter your name into the drawing for one of our five mystery boxes:

Follow us on Instagram

GO TO INSTAGRAM
 

Like our page on Facebook
